title: China’s New AI Breakthrough Shows Tim Cook’s Risky Final Bet Might Actually Be Genius
excerpt: Beijing just handed Tim Cook an approval that could rewrite the entire narrative around Apple's AI strategy, and it raises an uncomfortable question for ever...
content_html:
Quick Read

  • China approved Apple Intelligence via Alibaba and Baidu partnerships, sending AAPL shares to a record high as Greater China sales surged 28% to $20.5 billion.

  • In Hong Kong, BABA jumped 5% and BIDU rose 4% on news that their AI models unlocked China's market for Apple Intelligence.

  • Tim Cook's model-agnostic AI strategy deploys local partners like Alibaba in China and Google's Gemini in the US without Apple owning the compute.

  • Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Apple didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

For nearly two years, the knock on Apple (NASDAQ:AAPL) was that it had fallen behind in artificial intelligence. A single approval out of Beijing just complicated that story, and it may vindicate one of Tim Cook's most contrarian bets on Apple Intelligence China.

China's Cyberspace Administration has approved Apple Intelligence for launch in China, clearing a regulatory hurdle in place since the feature debuted in 2024. The approval hinges on a partnership integrating Alibaba (NYSE:BABA) and its Qwen model into Apple's operating systems, with Baidu (NASDAQ:BIDU) confirmed as a development partner.

Markets liked it. Apple shares climbed to a record high on the news, per CNBC's reporting, driving the Apple stock record high narrative. In Hong Kong trading, Alibaba jumped 5% and Baidu rose 4%.

Why This Approval Mattered So Much

Apple Intelligence had been stuck in China since 2024. Chinese rules require AI systems to run on approved domestic models, which is why the Alibaba Qwen and Baidu partnerships unlocked the door.

The stakes are visible. Apple's Greater China sales hit $20.5 billion in the second quarter of 2026, up 28% year over year. Its share of China's smartphone market rose to 18.1% from 13.9% a year earlier, according to IDC, helped by iPhone discounts during a recent shopping festival.

[fwp_analyst_ratings symbol="AAPL" /]

Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Apple didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

The Tim Cook AI Strategy Everyone Called Risky

While Microsoft, Google, Amazon, and Meta poured tens of billions into proprietary frontier models and data centers, Apple declined to join that arms race. It bet on a "model-agnostic" partnership approach, plugging in outside intelligence rather than owning it.

That looked passive to critics. But the China approval shows the upside. By partnering with Alibaba and Baidu, Apple met local regulatory requirements almost automatically. The same playbook is visible at home: Apple struck a multi-year deal to use Google's Gemini to help power its revamped Siri, expected to launch in September, running in part on Google Cloud and Nvidia chips.

sentences.zh: 同样的剧本在国内也能看到：苹果公司达成了一项多年协议，使用谷歌的 Gemini 来帮助其改进后的 Siri，预计将于 9 月推出，部分运行在谷歌云和 Nvidia 芯片上。

content_html_zh:
快速阅读

  • 中国通过阿里巴巴和百度的合作伙伴关系批准了 Apple Intelligence，使 AAPL 股价创下历史新高，大中华区销售额飙升 28% 至 205 亿美元。
  • 在香港，阿里巴巴股价上涨 5%，百度股价上涨 4%，原因是他们的人工智能模型为苹果智能打开了中国市场。
  • 蒂姆·库克的模型无关人工智能战略部署了中国的阿里巴巴和美国的谷歌 Gemini 等本地合作伙伴，但苹果不拥有计算能力。
  • 立即行动：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而苹果却没有上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

近两年来，苹果公司（纳斯达克股票代码：AAPL）受到的批评是它在人工智能领域的落后。 北京的一次批准只会让事情变得更加复杂，这可能会证明蒂姆·库克对苹果智能中国最逆向押注之一的正确性。

中国国家互联网信息办公室已批准 Apple Intelligence 在中国推出，扫清了该功能自 2024 年推出以来的监管障碍。 此次批准取决于将阿里巴巴（纽约证券交易所股票代码：BABA）及其 Qwen 模型整合到苹果操作系统中的合作伙伴关系，并确认百度（纳斯达克股票代码：BIDU）作为开发合作伙伴。

市场喜欢它。 据 CNBC 报道，这一消息传出后，苹果股价攀升至历史新高，推动苹果股价创下历史新高。 在香港交易中，阿里巴巴上涨 5%，百度上涨 4%。

为什么这一批准如此重要

Apple Intelligence自2024年起就一直滞留在中国。 中国的规定要求人工智能系统必须在经批准的国内模型上运行，这就是阿里巴巴 Qwen 和百度合作伙伴关系打开大门的原因。

赌注是可见的。 2026 年第二季度，苹果大中华区销售额达到 205 亿美元，同比增长 28%。 IDC 的数据显示，得益于最近购物节期间 iPhone 的折扣，中国智能手机市场份额从去年同期的 13.9% 上升至 18.1%。

[fwp_analyst_ ratings 符号=“AAPL”/]

立即行动：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而苹果却没有上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

蒂姆·库克的人工智能策略人人都认为有风险

尽管微软、谷歌、亚马逊和 Meta 向专有前沿模型和数据中心投入了数百亿美元，但苹果拒绝加入这场军备竞赛。 它押注于“与模型无关”的合作方式，插入外部情报而不是拥有它。

在批评者看来，这看起来很被动。 但中国的批准显示了积极的一面。 通过与阿里巴巴和百度合作，苹果几乎自动满足了当地的监管要求。 同样的剧本在国内也能看到：苹果公司达成了一项多年协议，使用谷歌的 Gemini 来帮助其改进后的 Siri，预计将于 9 月推出，部分运行在谷歌云和 Nvidia 芯片上。
